text:
to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| ESCO_NUMBER | ESCO Number | 
| ESCO_NAME | ESCO Name | 
| BENE_BIRTH_DT | Beneficiary Date of Birth | 
| BENE_DEATH_DT | Beneficiary Date of Death | 
| BENE_SEX | Beneficiary Sex | 
| MO1_ALIGN | Beneficiary Monthly Alignment Status 1 | 
| MO2_ALIGN | Beneficiary Monthly Alignment Status 2 | 
| MO3_ALIGN | Beneficiary Monthly Alignment Status 3 | 
|
